fa-house-flood.appearanceId: house silhouette with a peaked roof and a rising wave or water line overlaid at the base indicating flooding; residential structure outline with wavy water bands at the lower portion
fa-house-flood.functionalityId: indicates a property or area affected by flood water; marks a location as flooded or flood-risk
fa-house-flood.intentId: report or track a flood-affected property; identify a residential area at risk of or experiencing flooding

fa-house-flood-water.appearanceId: house silhouette with a peaked roof and distinct water wave shapes rising partway up the structure; residential outline with undulating flood water bands across the lower walls
fa-house-flood-water.functionalityId: displays flood water status at a residential address; marks a home as currently inundated with water
fa-house-flood-water.intentId: monitor flood water levels at a property; report a home as flood-damaged or actively flooded

fa-house-flood-water-circle-arrow-right.appearanceId: house silhouette with water waves at the base and a small circle containing a right-pointing arrow badge overlaid; flooded residential outline with a circular directional indicator
fa-house-flood-water-circle-arrow-right.functionalityId: directs or redirects away from a flooded property; routes emergency response or evacuation from a flood-affected home
fa-house-flood-water-circle-arrow-right.intentId: evacuate or reroute from a flooded residence; navigate away from a flood-affected area to safety

fa-house-laptop.appearanceId: house silhouette with a peaked roof and a small open laptop computer shape overlaid in the center; residential outline with a clamshell screen-and-keyboard device inside
fa-house-laptop.functionalityId: represents working or connecting from home; indicates remote work or a home office setup
fa-house-laptop.intentId: set up or access a home office or remote work environment; indicate work-from-home status

fa-house-leave.appearanceId: house silhouette with a peaked roof and an arrow pointing away from or out of the structure; residential outline with a directional arrow exiting through the side or door
fa-house-leave.functionalityId: indicates departing or leaving a home location; logs a check-out or exit from a residential address
fa-house-leave.intentId: record or confirm leaving a home or residence; log a departure from a tracked location

fa-house-lock.appearanceId: house silhouette with a peaked roof and a padlock shape overlaid at the front center; residential outline with a closed lock badge on the facade
fa-house-lock.functionalityId: marks a home as secured or access-restricted; locks or secures a residential smart home setting
fa-house-lock.intentId: secure or lock a home remotely; indicate that a residential property has restricted access

fa-house-medical.appearanceId: house silhouette with a peaked roof and a medical cross or plus symbol overlaid in the center; residential outline with a healthcare cross badge on the facade
fa-house-medical.functionalityId: marks a location as a medical home or healthcare facility; indicates in-home medical care or a healthcare address
fa-house-medical.intentId: identify a home used for medical or healthcare services; locate a residential healthcare or home-care address

fa-house-medical-circle-check.appearanceId: house silhouette with a medical cross and a small filled circle containing a checkmark badge overlaid at the corner; residential healthcare outline with a verification badge
fa-house-medical-circle-check.functionalityId: confirms a medical home visit is complete or approved; marks a healthcare residential address as verified
fa-house-medical-circle-check.intentId: verify or confirm a home medical appointment or care visit; mark a healthcare residential location as approved

fa-house-medical-circle-exclamation.appearanceId: house silhouette with a medical cross and a small filled circle containing an exclamation mark badge at the corner; residential healthcare outline with an alert warning badge
fa-house-medical-circle-exclamation.functionalityId: flags a medical home location as having an urgent alert or issue; warns that a home healthcare address needs immediate attention
fa-house-medical-circle-exclamation.intentId: address an urgent issue at a home medical care location; alert caregivers to a critical situation at a residential health address

fa-house-medical-circle-xmark.appearanceId: house silhouette with a medical cross and a small filled circle containing an X mark badge at the corner; residential healthcare outline with a rejection or cancellation badge
fa-house-medical-circle-xmark.functionalityId: marks a home medical location as closed, removed, or rejected; cancels or disables a home healthcare address entry
fa-house-medical-circle-xmark.intentId: close or remove a home medical care location; indicate that a residential healthcare address is no longer active

fa-house-medical-flag.appearanceId: house silhouette with a medical cross on the facade and a small flag or pennant mounted at the top or corner; residential healthcare outline with a flagging marker
fa-house-medical-flag.functionalityId: flags a home medical location for special attention or categorization; marks a healthcare residential address with a status flag
fa-house-medical-flag.intentId: flag a home healthcare location for priority review; categorize or mark a medical residential address with a status indicator

fa-house-night.appearanceId: house silhouette with a peaked roof and a crescent moon or star shape overlaid above or within the structure; residential outline with a night sky or moon badge
fa-house-night.functionalityId: represents a home at night or an overnight stay mode; activates night mode or a nighttime home automation setting
fa-house-night.intentId: enable night mode or overnight settings at home; indicate a property or system operating in night-time configuration

fa-house-return.appearanceId: house silhouette with a peaked roof and an arrow pointing back into or toward the structure; residential outline with a directional arrow returning inward
fa-house-return.functionalityId: indicates returning or arriving back at a home location; logs a check-in or return to a residential address
fa-house-return.intentId: record or confirm arriving home; log a return to a tracked residence or home base

fa-house-signal.appearanceId: house silhouette with a peaked roof and radiating arc signal bars overlaid above the structure; residential outline with wireless or connectivity wave marks emanating upward
fa-house-signal.functionalityId: represents a smart home with wireless connectivity; indicates home network signal or smart home hub status
fa-house-signal.intentId: check or manage home wireless signal or smart home connectivity; monitor the network status of a residential hub

fa-house-tree.appearanceId: house silhouette with a peaked roof placed beside or in front of a tree shape with a rounded canopy; residential structure outline with a deciduous tree silhouette adjacent to it
fa-house-tree.functionalityId: marks a residential property with outdoor greenery or garden space; represents an eco-friendly or nature-adjacent home
fa-house-tree.intentId: find or list a home with a garden or tree-filled property; indicate an environmentally friendly or nature-adjacent residence

fa-house-tsunami.appearanceId: house silhouette with a peaked roof and a large curling tsunami wave shape looming over or crashing into the structure; residential outline with a towering wave crest overhead
fa-house-tsunami.functionalityId: marks a location at risk of or affected by a tsunami; indicates a coastal hazard or extreme flood event at a property
fa-house-tsunami.intentId: alert about a tsunami threat or impact at a coastal property; identify a residence in a tsunami hazard zone

fa-house-turret.appearanceId: house silhouette with a main peaked roof and a taller cylindrical or square tower turret shape rising from one side; residential structure with a castle-like tower extension at one end
fa-house-turret.functionalityId: represents a fortified or historic residential structure; marks a property with a turret or tower architectural feature
fa-house-turret.intentId: identify a historic or castle-style residential property; browse listings featuring turret or tower architectural elements

fa-house-window.appearanceId: house silhouette with a peaked roof and a visible rectangular window shape on the facade; residential outline with a paned window opening in the front wall
fa-house-window.functionalityId: represents a residential property with a visible window feature; marks a home with a defined window element in a design or listing
fa-house-window.intentId: identify a home by its window design or facade; browse properties or architectural styles featuring windows

fa-hryvnia.appearanceId: a stylized Ukrainian hryvnia currency glyph resembling a cursive h-like letterform with two horizontal strikethrough lines; calligraphic currency symbol with dual parallel crossbars
fa-hryvnia.functionalityId: displays or selects the Ukrainian hryvnia as the currency; represents a price or monetary value in UAH
fa-hryvnia.intentId: work with Ukrainian hryvnia pricing or currency conversion; display or set a UAH monetary value

fa-humidity.appearanceId: a water droplet shape beside or above a percentage sign or horizontal arc indicating moisture level; teardrop silhouette with humidity measurement marks or a wave line
fa-humidity.functionalityId: displays the current humidity level or moisture percentage; monitors atmospheric water content in a weather or environment app
fa-humidity.intentId: check or track humidity levels in a space or weather forecast; monitor indoor or outdoor moisture conditions

fa-hurricane.appearanceId: a swirling spiral shape with tightly wound circular arms radiating outward from a central eye; cyclone or vortex silhouette with inward-curving arcs forming a rotating storm pattern
fa-hurricane.functionalityId: indicates a hurricane or tropical storm weather event; marks a location or forecast as impacted by a cyclone
fa-hurricane.intentId: track a hurricane or tropical storm path and impact; monitor severe cyclone weather in a forecast or alert system

fa-hydra.appearanceId: a multi-headed serpentine creature with several long necks and heads extending from a single body; mythological serpent silhouette with multiple branching necks and snake heads
fa-hydra.functionalityId: represents a multi-headed challenge or complex interconnected system; marks a fantasy or mythological creature category
fa-hydra.intentId: indicate a multi-faceted problem or hydra-like system architecture; access fantasy or mythology-themed content

fa-hyphen.appearanceId: a single short horizontal dash or line centered in the glyph space; a plain minus-length stroke with no arrowheads or decorations
fa-hyphen.functionalityId: inserts a hyphen or dash character into text; represents a punctuation separator in a text editor
fa-hyphen.intentId: add a hyphen or word-break character to text; use a dash punctuation mark in a document or label

fa-i.appearanceId: a single uppercase or lowercase letter I as a plain sans-serif or serif letterform; vertical stroke glyph representing the ninth letter of the alphabet
fa-i.functionalityId: represents the letter I as a label or initial; marks a category or item starting with the letter I
fa-i.intentId: label or categorize content starting with I; use the letter I as a shorthand or identifier

fa-i-cursor.appearanceId: a text insertion cursor shape consisting of a thin vertical bar with small horizontal serifs at the top and bottom; I-beam caret symbol used to indicate a text editing position
fa-i-cursor.functionalityId: indicates a text input or editing cursor position; activates or shows a text entry field is focused
fa-i-cursor.intentId: position the cursor for text entry or editing; indicate that a text field is active and ready for input

fa-ice-cream.appearanceId: a rounded scoop of ice cream sitting on top of a waffle cone shape; dome-shaped dessert ball atop a pointed triangular cone outline
fa-ice-cream.functionalityId: marks a dessert or ice cream item in a food or menu app; represents a frozen treat category in a restaurant or shop
fa-ice-cream.intentId: find ice cream or frozen dessert options; browse dessert menu items or treat shop locations

fa-ice-skate.appearanceId: a side-profile boot or shoe shape with a flat blade running along the bottom edge; ice skate silhouette with a horizontal metal runner beneath the boot
fa-ice-skate.functionalityId: marks an ice skating activity or winter sport in a recreation app; represents figure skating or hockey skate equipment
fa-ice-skate.intentId: find ice skating rinks or winter sport activities; browse skating equipment or winter recreation options

fa-icicles.appearanceId: a row of downward-pointing pointed spike shapes of varying lengths hanging from a horizontal surface; tapering ice spike silhouettes suspended in a line with jagged irregular lengths
fa-icicles.functionalityId: represents a freezing cold or winter weather condition; marks a surface or environment with ice formation
fa-icicles.intentId: indicate freezing temperatures or icy surface conditions; convey a winter or cold-weather hazard in a weather or environment app

fa-icons.appearanceId: a cluster of small mixed symbols including a heart, music note, and other graphic marks arranged together; a collage of assorted miniature icon shapes grouped in a single tile
fa-icons.functionalityId: opens an icon picker or symbol library; accesses a collection of available icons or glyphs in a design tool
fa-icons.intentId: browse or select an icon from a library; access a symbol or glyph picker in a design or editing app

fa-id-badge.appearanceId: a vertically oriented rectangular card or badge with a small person silhouette at the top and horizontal text lines below; portrait-format credential badge outline with a head-and-shoulders figure and name fields
fa-id-badge.functionalityId: displays an identification badge or credential for a person; represents a name tag or staff ID in an employee or access system
fa-id-badge.intentId: view or manage a person's ID badge or credentials; display an employee or event identification tag

fa-id-card.appearanceId: a horizontally oriented rectangular card shape with a small person head silhouette on one side and horizontal text lines on the other; landscape-format identity card outline with a photo zone and data fields
fa-id-card.functionalityId: represents a government or official identification card; opens an identity verification or profile card view
fa-id-card.intentId: verify a person's identity with an ID card; access or display official identification credentials

fa-id-card-alt.appearanceId: a horizontally oriented rectangular card with a person silhouette and a slightly different layout or badge clip element compared to the standard ID card; landscape identity card outline with an alternate position for the photo or holder clip
fa-id-card-alt.functionalityId: represents an alternative form of identification card; opens an alternate credential or membership card view
fa-id-card-alt.intentId: use an alternative ID or membership card for verification; display a secondary or alternate credential card

fa-igloo.appearanceId: a domed hemispherical structure with a small arched entrance tunnel at the base; rounded snow dome silhouette with a low curved tunnel entrance at the front
fa-igloo.functionalityId: represents an igloo or arctic dwelling; marks a cold-climate shelter or winter survival structure
fa-igloo.intentId: identify an arctic or ice shelter location; access cold-climate housing or winter survival content

fa-ils.appearanceId: a stylized shekel sign consisting of two Hebrew letterforms or a currency glyph with two vertical strokes and a horizontal element; monetary symbol resembling interlocked letters with vertical bars
fa-ils.functionalityId: displays or selects the Israeli new shekel as the currency; represents a price or monetary value in ILS
fa-ils.intentId: work with Israeli shekel pricing or currency conversion; display or set an ILS monetary value

fa-image.appearanceId: a rectangular frame outline with a small mountain or hill shape and a circle sun in the upper corner representing a landscape photo; picture frame silhouette with a scenic mountain-and-sun thumbnail
fa-image.functionalityId: inserts or displays an image in a document or interface; opens an image file or photo viewer
fa-image.intentId: add or view an image in a document or media library; browse and select a photo or picture file

fa-image-polaroid.appearanceId: a square polaroid photo frame with a wide white border at the bottom and a smaller landscape thumbnail in the upper image area; instant photo print outline with a thick bottom margin and a scenic inner picture
fa-image-polaroid.functionalityId: represents a polaroid-style instant photo or printed picture; displays or shares a photo in a vintage polaroid format
fa-image-polaroid.intentId: view or share a photo in a polaroid or instant-print style; add a vintage polaroid aesthetic to an image

fa-image-polaroid-user.appearanceId: a polaroid-style photo frame with a wide bottom border and a person or portrait silhouette inside the image area; instant print outline with a thick lower margin and a head-and-shoulders figure in the photo space
fa-image-polaroid-user.functionalityId: displays a user portrait or profile photo in a polaroid format; represents a personal photo or contact image as an instant print
fa-image-polaroid-user.intentId: view or share a user's profile photo in a polaroid style; display a contact portrait as a vintage instant photo

fa-image-slash.appearanceId: a rectangular image frame outline with a diagonal slash line crossing through it; picture frame silhouette with a cancellation or broken-image stroke
fa-image-slash.functionalityId: indicates a broken, missing, or unavailable image; marks a media placeholder when an image fails to load
fa-image-slash.intentId: indicate that an image is unavailable or could not be loaded; handle a broken image or missing media placeholder

fa-image-user.appearanceId: a rectangular image frame with a person or head-and-shoulders silhouette inside as the main subject; picture frame outline with a human portrait figure filling the photo area
fa-image-user.functionalityId: represents a user profile photo or avatar image; displays a person's portrait in an image or media context
fa-image-user.intentId: view or set a user's profile picture; display a person's avatar or portrait in a media library

fa-images.appearanceId: two or more overlapping rectangular image frames each containing a landscape thumbnail; stacked picture frame silhouettes forming a photo collection pile
fa-images.functionalityId: opens a photo gallery or multiple image view; navigates to a collection of pictures or media files
fa-images.intentId: browse a gallery of multiple images or photos; access a media collection or photo album

fa-images-user.appearanceId: two overlapping rectangular image frames each containing a person or portrait silhouette; stacked picture frame outlines with head-and-shoulders figures suggesting a user photo collection
fa-images-user.functionalityId: opens a gallery of user profile photos or contact portraits; displays a collection of person images in a media or directory view
fa-images-user.intentId: browse user profile pictures or a contacts photo gallery; view a collection of portraits or people images

fa-inbox.appearanceId: a rectangular tray or box shape open at the top with a flat bottom and low side walls; horizontal inbox tray silhouette with no contents inside
fa-inbox.functionalityId: opens an email inbox or message tray; navigates to incoming messages or notifications
fa-inbox.intentId: check and read incoming messages or emails; access the inbox for new notifications or correspondence

fa-inbox-full.appearanceId: a rectangular tray or box shape with horizontal lines or stacked items filling the interior; inbox tray silhouette with multiple content rows suggesting it is full
fa-inbox-full.functionalityId: indicates an inbox with unread messages or at capacity; displays a full or heavily loaded message tray
fa-inbox-full.intentId: review an overflowing inbox of messages; manage a backlog of incoming notifications or emails

fa-inbox-in.appearanceId: a rectangular tray or box shape with a downward-pointing arrow entering from above; inbox tray silhouette with an arrow descending into the container from the top
fa-inbox-in.functionalityId: receives or downloads incoming items into an inbox or tray; indicates an inbound message or file arriving
fa-inbox-in.intentId: receive or import items into an inbox; process incoming files or messages arriving in a tray

fa-inbox-out.appearanceId: a rectangular tray or box shape with an upward-pointing arrow exiting from the top; inbox tray silhouette with an arrow rising out of the container upward
fa-inbox-out.functionalityId: sends or moves items out of an inbox or tray; indicates an outbound message or file being dispatched
fa-inbox-out.intentId: send or export items from an inbox or tray; move outgoing files or messages from a queue

fa-inboxes.appearanceId: two rectangular tray or box shapes stacked or arranged side by side; a pair of inbox tray silhouettes grouped together as a dual-tray set
fa-inboxes.functionalityId: manages multiple inboxes or message trays simultaneously; switches between or organizes separate inbox queues
fa-inboxes.intentId: manage multiple inboxes or message queues; organize separate communication channels in a unified tray view

fa-indent.appearanceId: a series of horizontal text lines with the first line having a right-pointing arrow or the lines stepping progressively to the right; paragraph lines with a leading indent arrow at the left margin
fa-indent.functionalityId: increases the indentation level of selected text or a paragraph; adds a tab or left margin offset to a block of text
fa-indent.intentId: indent text or a paragraph to structure a document; increase the left margin of a selected block of content

fa-industry.appearanceId: a factory or industrial building silhouette with a large rectangular structure and one or more tall chimney stacks rising from the roofline; plant building outline with vertical smoke stacks
fa-industry.functionalityId: represents an industrial facility, factory, or manufacturing site; marks a category as industrial or production-related
fa-industry.intentId: identify or locate an industrial facility or manufacturing plant; access industry or factory-related content in a business app
